entry.data:
PARTLY SUNNY THIS MORNING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
HIGHS IN THE UPPER 70S
SOUTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH

CLOUDY WITH A CHANCE OF SHOWERS
A SLIGHT CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS IN THE EVENING, THEN A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS AFTER MIDNIGHT
LOWS IN THE MID 60S
SOUTH WINDS AROUND 15 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 50 PERCENT

A CHANCE OF THUNDERSTORMS
SHOWERS
HIGHS IN THE LOWER 70S
TEMPERATURE FALLING INTO THE MID 50S IN THE AFTERNOON
SOUTHWEST WINDS AROUND 15 MPH, BECOMING NORTHWEST IN THE AFTERNOON
CHANCE OF RAIN NEAR 100 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE EVENING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 30S
NORTH WINDS 15 TO 20 MPH WITH GUSTS UP TO 30 MPH
CHANCE OF RAIN 60 PERCENT

SUNNY, COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE MID 50S
NORTH WINDS AROUND 5 MPH, BECOMING WEST IN THE AFTERNOON

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

PARTLY SUNNY
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S

PARTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE LOWER 40S

PARTLY CLOUDY IN THE EVENING, THEN BECOMING MOSTLY CLOUDY
LOWS IN THE MID 50S

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF SHOWERS IN THE MORNING, THEN SHOWERS LIKELY IN THE AFTERNOON
HIGHS IN THE MID 60S
CHANCE OF RAIN 70 PERCENT

MOSTLY CLOUDY
A CHANCE OF RAIN AND SNOW SHOWERS IN THE EVENING
MUCH COOLER WITH LOWS IN THE MID 20S
CHANCE OF PRECIPITATION 40 PERCENT

MOSTLY SUNNY
MUCH COOLER WITH HIGHS IN THE UPPER 30S
